macro.title: Homebuyers Can Afford to Take Their Time Heading Into Spring 2026
macro.what: The typical home that went under contract in February spent 66 days on the market—the slowest February pace in a decade
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Jump Back Above 6% As Pending Home Sales, New Listings Post Small Improvements
macro.what: A Redfin agent in Austin said the upside of higher mortgage rates is that they decrease competition, allowing house hunters to negotiate prices down and ask for concessions
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Montana Supreme Court upholds 2023 housing reform laws
housing.what: The Montana Supreme Court issued a unanimous ruling this week upholding the state’s 2023 housing reform package, preserving a suite of zoning changes intended to increase housing supply

housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Midwest Real Estate Data moves to abandon NAR membership requirement
